command:
echo '=== VM-CLAUDE-HUB FULL SEARCH FOR DELEGATOR ==='
find /home/jose -name 'moreno-delegate' -o -name 'moreno_unified*' -o -name 'delegator*' 2>/dev/null | grep -v .git | grep -v __pycache__
echo '=== CONFIG DIR ==='
ls /home/jose/.config/ 2>/dev/null
cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json 2>/dev/null
echo '=== LOCAL BIN ==='
ls /home/jose/.local/bin/ 2>/dev/null
echo '=== MORENO AI REPO ON CLAUDE HUB ==='
ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/ 2>/dev/null && git -C /home/jose/moreno-ai log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null
echo DONE_1874
